description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a broad, dark brown gable roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a grassy plot with a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The front facade features a central wooden door flanked by large stone columns and windows, giving it a rustic yet modern appearance. The exterior walls are primarily clad in stone, with wood accents around the doors and windows, and the roof is punctuated by several chimneys and skylights. The rear side mirrors the front in material but lacks a prominent entrance, instead featuring more stonework and smaller windows. Both shorter sides of the bungalow have covered porch areas supported by stone columns, providing sheltered outdoor space. The overall design is low and wide, emphasizing horizontal lines and blending with the surrounding landscape.
description: A single-story, stone-and-wood bungalow with a wide gable roof, prominent chimneys, and covered porches on both ends. The facade features a central entrance, large windows, and rustic-modern detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central wooden door, large windows, and stone columns with a paved walkway leading up.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the gable roof, covered porch area, and stone columns supporting the roof extension.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid stone facade with smaller windows and no main entrance, emphasizing the bungalow's length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a covered porch area, visible skylights on the roof, and stone columns similar to the other side.
